name: Vegetable Sausage (Hoy Jaw)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and water to form a paste and set aside.
2. In a mortar, pound together the garlic, coriander root, and peppercorns to form a paste. Heat the oil and briefly fry the garlic paste. Add all the remaining ingredients down to sugar, stirring constantly. Add the flour and water paste and stir to thicken. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Drain the beancurd sheets and spread out on a flat surface. Place a line of the cooled filling along one edge of each sheet and roll to form a long sausage. Place the 3 sausages in a steamer and steam for 15 minutes. Remove and let cool.
4. When ready to serve, deep-fry the sausages until golden brown, drain, slice into 1/4-inch (6 mm) rounds, and serve on a bed of lettuce and mint leaves with Plum Sauce.
